name: Cheeese Filling for Nut & Poppy Seed Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Put cottage cheese through a sieve and add the rest of the ingredients, blending well.
2. Prepare dough for Nut & Poppyseed Rolls (#164).
3. Cut the dough into squares and press them into the bottoms of cupcake tins.
4. Fill each cupcake with a little cheese and fold the corners of the dough toward the center.
5. Bake at 350°F until brown.
